cit.basis: Flat 15% corporate income tax (porez na dobit pravnih lica).
cit.note: Administered by the Tax Administration (Poreska uprava).

vat.note: Standard PDV rate 20%; reduced rate 10% on certain goods and services.

wht.note: 20% withholding on certain payments to non-residents, subject to tax treaties.

official_sources.name: Tax Administration of the Republic of Serbia (Poreska uprava)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates and thresholds for the 2025 target period; NOT verified against primary legislation or the tax authority. Must be verified before any real use.
rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
